comment: GUIDE PURPOSE: Tech Stack & Architecture Guide regarding Next.js App Router hybrid model, component boundaries, and server actions

rules.title: Directory Structure Conventions
rules.requirement: Group code modules logically by domain and reusability profiles

structure./app: Route entry points and route specific Server Actions/CSS modules
structure./components/layout: Global shell layout containers (header, footer, sidebar)
structure./lib: Stateless system modules (validation, storage, audit logging)

rules.title: Server and Client Component Isolation
rules.requirement: Separate data fetching configurations from client interactivity layouts
rules.mechanism: Keep page.tsx as a Server Component for database fetching. Put client side hooks, local state, and event handling into separate Client Component files (marked with 'use client')

rules.title: Server Actions Boundary
rules.requirement: Declare Server Actions in dedicated actions.ts files
rules.mechanism: Mark action files with 'use server'. Perform authentication and session verification inside each action before proceeding to database transactions

rules.title: TypeScript Types Integrations
rules.requirement: Synchronize all database table records with explicit TypeScript types
rules.mechanism: Export type interfaces inside /lib/types.ts matching database constraints. Ensure no generic 'any' typing is assigned on model structures

rules.title: Standardized CSS Breakpoint Schema
rules.requirement: Establish a consistent, predictable set of layout breakpoints to govern responsiveness across all custom CSS modules
rules.mechanism: Enforce a unified breakpoint scale in media queries: mobile first starts default; small tablets @media (min-width: 640px); large tablets @media (min-width: 768px); small desktops @media (min-width: 1024px); large desktops @media (min-width: 1280px)
